hooks.command: node tools/engine-pilot/lib/smoke-test.mjs > /tmp/leve-smoke.log 2>&1 && node tools/engine-pilot/run-pilot.mjs --profile=akseli-elite-streetlifter --scenario=full-16w > /tmp/leve-pilot.log 2>&1 && node tools/wizard-pilot.mjs > /tmp/leve-wizard-pilot.log 2>&1 && node tools/browser-test/run-browser-tests.mjs > /tmp/leve-browser-tests.log 2>&1 && echo 'STOP HOOK OK: smoke + Akseli pilot + wizard-pilot + selaintestit passed' || { echo 'STOP HOOK FAILED — see /tmp/leve-smoke.log, /tmp/leve-pilot.log, /tmp/leve-wizard-pilot.log, /tmp/leve-browser-tests.log'; tail -30 /tmp/leve-smoke.log; tail -30 /tmp/leve-pilot.log; tail -30 /tmp/leve-wizard-pilot.log; tail -60 /tmp/leve-browser-tests.log; exit 1; }
